title: LIVIVO 6 Compartment Cutlery Tray – Grey & White Kitchen Drawer Organiser for Knives, Forks, Spoons, Utensils – BPA-Free Plastic Drawer Divider with Anti-Slip Base – Durable & Easy to Clean
features: DECLUTTER YOUR DRAWERS Tired of messy kitchen drawers? The LIVIVO cutlery tray features 6 dedicated compartments to neatly store forks, spoons, knives, and utensils—helping you maintain a clean, organised kitchen setup with ease.

SMART & SPACIOUS ORGANISATION Designed with varying compartment sizes, this tray accommodates a wide range of flatware and tools. Perfect for everyday cutlery or large utensils, making it a versatile organiser for every household.

BPA-FREE & ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIALS Crafted from durable, thick BPA-free PP plastic, this organiser is both safe and eco-conscious. The sturdy build and non-slip base prevent movement, keeping contents in place even with frequent drawer use.

MULTI-USE FUNCTIONALITY Not just for the kitchen—this neutral grey and white tray is ideal for organising office supplies, cosmetics, makeup brushes, art tools, and more. A clutter-free home starts with flexible storage like this.

DIMENSIONS & LOW-MAINTENANCE DESIGN Approximate size: 40.5 x 33 x 4.5cm. Lightweight and easy to clean with just a damp cloth, this organiser keeps your drawers spotless and your items secure—no more clattering or sliding around.
description: Product Description LIVIVO 6 Compartment Cutlery Tray Looking to bring a bit of order to your cutlery drawers? The LIVIVO cutlery tray is the perfect spacious solution for optimum organisation. And thanks to the rubber grips attached to the bottom of the tray, you can avoid rattling noises when opening and closing the drawer. The thermoplastic rubber at the base ensures the cutlery tray stays in your drawers, all in the right place. Non-slip base. Little rubber grips. Smooth rounded edges.
